34.reason: [The swap function does not correctly reverse the previous swap. The current swap implementation shifts elements instead of performing a simple exchange, so swapping back with the same function does not restore the original array state, leading to incorrect permutations and potentially missing or duplicated outputs.]

46.reason: [This function does not perform a standard swap; it shifts elements between p and i, which breaks the permutation generation logic. A correct swap should only exchange two elements, not shift a block. This causes both logical errors in permutation generation and failure to maintain lexicographical order.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This function does not perform a standard swap; it shifts elements between p and i, which breaks the permutation generation logic. reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This function does not perform a standard swap between two indices. Instead, it moves the element at index 'i' to position 'p' by shifting all intermediate elements right, which alters more than two positions. This breaks the assumption needed for backtracking in permutation generation, causing incorrect results.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This function does not perform a standard swap; it rotates/shifts elements from index p to i, which breaks the permutation generation logic. A correct swap should only exchange two elements, not shift a block. This causes both incorrect output and failure to generate all permutations in lexicographical order.]
